title: lilium pyrenaicum subsp. carniolicum
intro: Lilium pyrenaicum subsp. carniolicum, also known as the Carniolan lily or white lily, is a subspecies of the Lilium pyrenaicum plant, a species of flowering plant in the lily family native to the mountains of the European Alps. The medicinal properties of Lilium pyrenaicum subsp. carniolicum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the bulbs and flowers of Lilium pyrenaicum subsp. carniolicum are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of health problems.
